reply:
Mujhe pata hai aapko bypass surgery ke liye hospitals chahiye under 3 lakh in Mumbai. Main aapko kuch options dikhata hoon jahan aapko ye procedure mil sakta hai. Aapko hospital ki tier aur specific details bhi milenge.

📍 **Clinical Pathway:** 12 steps (Surgery (On-Pump), ICU + Ward, Discharge + Follow-Up, Follow-Up, Robotic Surgery (TECAB), ICU Care, OPCAB Surgery, Pre-Op + Patient Selection, Pre-Op Assessment, ICU + Discharge, Ward + Discharge)

⚠️ _Yeh ek advisory hai. Diagnosis ke liye doctor se zaroor milein. Kisi bhi emergency mein 112 ya nazdiki hospital jaayein._

cost.clinical_notes: LIMA to LAD gold standard. ICU 3 days.
cost.disclaimer: Indicative estimate ±20–25%. Actual depends on case complexity, surgeon fee, implant brand. No GST on surgery/hospital services in India. Room GST 5% only if >₹5,000/day. Consult hospital for formal quotation.

budget_check.message: ❌ Advanced Multispecialty mein estimated cost ₹335,961–₹448,374 hai, jo aapke budget ₹300,000 se zyada hai. Neeche ke tier ka hospital ya Government hospital try karein.

structured_data.budget_filter_message: ₹300,000 budget ke andar 2 hospital(s) dikha rahe hain.

full_result.clinical_notes: LIMA to LAD gold standard. ICU 3 days.

clinical_pathway.action: Coronary Angiography; ECHO (EF%, wall motion); CBC, Coag, KFT, LFT, Carotid Duplex
clinical_pathway.decision: CABG preferred: Left Main disease, 3-vessel disease, SYNTAX >32, EF<35%
clinical_pathway.note: LIMA to LAD: gold standard anastomosis

clinical_pathway.action: Median sternotomy; cardiopulmonary bypass; cardioplegia; LIMA-LAD + SVG grafts; decannulation
Ventilated ICU 6-24h; inotropes; serial ECG + troponin; drain output monitoring
clinical_pathway.note: Graft occlusion: new ST change = urgent angiography

clinical_pathway.action: Mobilise Day 3-4; sternal precautions 6 weeks; discharge Day 7-10; cardiac rehab
clinical_pathway.decision: DAPT + statin + ACEI + beta-blocker at discharge

clinical_pathway.action: ECG + ECHO at 6 weeks; stress test at 3 months; angiography if symptoms recur
clinical_pathway.decision: Graft patency: LIMA 10-year >90%; SVG 50% at 10 years

icd10.primary_desc: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery (on-pump CABG)
icd10.secondary_note: Presence of coronary artery bypass graft (post-op status code)

procedure_ot_surgeon.description: Surgery package + OT + Anaesthesia + Dr Visits
procedure_ot_surgeon.note: Comorb adj 1.0x on BASE ₹85,000. Room type adj 1.15x.

hospital_stay_room.note: Base room/day ₹4,000 × 10 base days + 0 comorb days

implant_consumable.note: Fixed regardless of hospital tier. Govt/Small: 0.70-0.85x

technology_premium.note: CGHS CV013 CABG = 153900; CPB consumables avg 12000-18000 = 15000; no robotic premium

gst_room_5pct.description: 5% GST on room rent above ₹5,000/day only
gst_room_5pct.note: Surgery/hospital services exempt from GST in India

━━ TAXES ━━.surgery_gst: EXEMPT — healthcare services not taxable in India

loan_relevant_amount.note: Includes 15% contingency buffer + 10% lender safety margin.

full_result.disclaimer: Indicative estimate ±20–25%. Actual depends on case complexity, surgeon fee, implant brand. No GST on surgery/hospital services in India. Room GST 5% only if >₹5,000/day. Consult hospital for formal quotation.

follow_up_question: Which type of hospital do you want? (Standard Secondary General, Tertiary Corporate, Advanced Multispecialty, Small Day-Care Clinics, Boutique Super-Specialty)
